title: Complete Interactions API Tool Turn and Provider Context Circulation · Independent Program Trial
summary: An independent organization supplies a different user population, task distribution, tool set, risk tier, model response, resource budget, accessibility need, and failure condition and transfers complete interactions api tool turn and provider context circulation into a changed one complete correlated Gemini tool turn. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of one complete correlated Gemini tool turn with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through predi…
objectives: Classify model output, function call, function result, built-in tool, retrieval, safety, error, and terminal interaction steps exhaustively.
Reserve call identity before execution and reconcile retries so one logical function call cannot create duplicate effects.
Return the exact function name, call ID, bounded typed result parts, and required tools and configuration in the follow-up interaction.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.text: A lab agent engineering team handles case 2654 during a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review. Build deterministic Python evidence to execute one complete Interactions API tool turn with step classification, call-result correlation, provider context preservation, and final provenance; last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure; then inject cancellation, retry, repeated-call, checkpoint, or replay failure and recover without duplicate effects. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Classify model output, function call, function result, built-in tool, retrieval, safety, error, and terminal interaction steps exhaustively.

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Final Output Provenance
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-final-output-provenance-1xzkxb" that uses case 8033 to execute one complete Interactions API tool turn with step classification, call-result correlation, provider context preservation, and final provenance. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Final Output Provenance.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Final Output Provenance into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Final Output Provenance, keep Final Output Provenance connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-final-output-provenance-1xzkxb
# Competency: agentpy-final-output-provenance.
# Case 8033: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: replace trusted context with untrusted indirect instructions and preserve data-versus-instruction boundaries.
def evidence_agentpy_final_output_provenance_1xzkxb(model_steps: int = 6, tool_calls: int = 2, tool_results: int = 2, final_outputs: int = 1, lost_provider_context: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1xzkxb = "1xzkxb-bxkzx1-8033"
    assert evidence_variant_1xzkxb
    evidence_axes_1xzkxb = (
        "authority1xzkxb",
        "interaction8033",
        "toolbxkzx1",
        "state1xzkxb8033",
        "evaluation80331xzkxb",
        "recoverybxkzx18033",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1xzkxb)) == 6
    if model_steps < 3 or tool_calls < 1:
        return False, model_steps, "tool-turn-shape"
    if tool_results != tool_calls:
        return False, tool_results, "tool-result-gap"
    if final_outputs != 1:
        return False, final_outputs, "final-output-count"
    if lost_provider_context > 0:
        return False, lost_provider_context, "provider-context-loss"
    assert tool_results == tool_calls and final_outputs == 1
    return True, tool_results, "complete-tool-turn"

options.text: Reject the unsupported conclusion, name the violated Final Output Provenance condition, repair the responsible layer, and rerun the boundary trace.
